title: Confessions of a Necrophile Girl
overview: Based on the true-life story of American necrophile Karen Greenlee.  In the film, Karen (Angela del Regno) relives the most important moments of her life through a video diary—from childhood, first love, and scandal about her sexual attraction for corpses.
